acceptance_targets: [ch3_f001] PASS if the revised passage between lines 243-247 contains all three observable elements before the meeting starts: (1) a specific physical/procedural evidence action, (2) a direct family-consequence moment involving Tina/Fenn notification dynamics, and (3) a focalized physical or emotional cost for Lena; FAIL if it still jumps from rain onset directly to packet count/meeting setup.

[ch3_f002] PASS if each flagged span contains at least two distinct Lena-interiority paragraphs tied to immediate stimuli (crowd, bodies, cameras, command pressure); FAIL if either span remains purely external action/dialogue for 10+ consecutive paragraphs.

[ch3_f003] PASS if revised lines show character-distinct rhythm in each exchange (Mara reframes at least once, Clay uses at least one institutional deflection, Lena uses at least one compact procedural-to-blunt shift) and the exact word "documented" appears no more than once across lines 189-241; FAIL otherwise.

[ch3_f004] PASS if the repeated opener "The email had no mention of" appears at most once in lines 379-383 and the replacement lines each add a distinct concrete consequence; FAIL if the same opener still appears three times.

[ch3_f005] PASS if final paragraphs show Lena taking one observable investigative step toward Tina before chapter end and include one explicit obstacle/urgency marker; FAIL if the ending remains primarily abstract declaratives without enacted next-move pressure.

[F004] Pass if revised chapter 3 leaves injury interpretation compatible with the eventual confession track; fail if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:789 still unequivocally identifies a deep throat-cut kill mechanism without reconciliation space.

[F007] Pass if the revised scene gives each speaker a distinct rhythm/lexicon under pressure and reduces repeated institutional slogan nouns; fail if dialogue remains interchangeable in register and sentence architecture.

[F011] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:961 remains the only still/flat facial-template usage in chapter 3 after revision; fail if additional "went still/went flat" face/eye constructions appear in chapter_03.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage between lines 243-247 contains all three observable elements before the meeting starts: (1) a specific physical/procedural evidence action, (2) a direct family-consequence moment involving Tina/Fenn notification dynamics, and (3) a focalized physical or emotional cost for Lena; FAIL if it still jumps from rain onset directly to packet count/meeting setup.
findings.evidence: `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:243` cuts from storm-chaos to `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:245` (administrative packet summary) and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:247` (command meeting), skipping embodied aftermath at the exact point of maximum social and family consequence.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the narrative substitutes procedural summary for scene presence immediately after the river-ramp trauma, reducing bodily, social, and moral consequence to paperwork transition.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the transition block at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:243`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:245`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:247` to include on-page aftermath beats before the meeting: one concrete custody-preservation action, one concrete family-impact beat (Tina or immediate NOK handling), and one embodied reaction from Lena tied to the storm and crowd pressure.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each flagged span contains at least two distinct Lena-interiority paragraphs tied to immediate stimuli (crowd, bodies, cameras, command pressure); FAIL if either span remains purely external action/dialogue for 10+ consecutive paragraphs.
findings.evidence: A 10-paragraph external-only run appears from `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:145` through `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:163`; another long external run extends from `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:221` to `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:277` before interior texture resumes.
findings.problem: Interiority drought: extended screenplay-like stretches mute Lena's internal processing, weakening close-third anchoring required by the style bible.
findings.rewrite_direction: Add compact interior beats inside the two flagged spans (`snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:145`-`snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:163` and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:221`-`snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:277`) that register thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment under pressure without stalling scene motion.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines show character-distinct rhythm in each exchange (Mara reframes at least once, Clay uses at least one institutional deflection, Lena uses at least one compact procedural-to-blunt shift) and the exact word "documented" appears no more than once across lines 189-241; FAIL otherwise.
findings.evidence: Token reuse and aphoristic convergence cluster at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:99`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:189`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:223`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:241` (\"documented\"/records rhetoric), plus similarly polished maxim cadence at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:237`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:321`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:355`.
findings.problem: Idiolect separation softens under pressure: Lena, Clay, and Mara intermittently sound cut from the same rhetorical template (institutional abstraction plus quotable maxims), flattening register distinction.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework dialogue in `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:189`-`snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:193`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:223`-`snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:241`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:347`-`snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:355` so Mara leads with interrogative/reframing moves, Clay stays institutionally evasive, and Lena stays procedural-to-blunt rather than sloganic.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the repeated opener "The email had no mention of" appears at most once in lines 379-383 and the replacement lines each add a distinct concrete consequence; FAIL if the same opener still appears three times.
findings.evidence: Identical sentence construction repeats three times at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:379`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:381`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:383` ("The email had no mention of ...").
findings.problem: Recurring formula crosses the >2 threshold and reads as autopilot emphasis rather than sharpened progression.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:379`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:381`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:383` to keep at most one repeated opener and replace the others with materially different constructions that escalate consequence (public perception, departmental behavior, or family impact).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if final paragraphs show Lena taking one observable investigative step toward Tina before chapter end and include one explicit obstacle/urgency marker; FAIL if the ending remains primarily abstract declaratives without enacted next-move pressure.
findings.evidence: Closing movement at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:389`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:391`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:393`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:395`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:397` shifts into abstract thesis statements before the actionable lead at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:399`.
findings.problem: Timidity at the chapter exit: the prose retreats from immediate dramatic consequence into summary aphorism, weakening forward causal propulsion.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the ending block at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:389`-`snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_03.md:399` around an active Tina-lead beat (contact attempt, location urgency, or interception risk), then keep thematic framing to one concise line max.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if revised chapter 3 leaves injury interpretation compatible with the eventual confession track; fail if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:789 still unequivocally identifies a deep throat-cut kill mechanism without reconciliation space.
findings.problem: Second-victim injury logic conflicts with later confession: chapter 3 gives Fenn a deep throat cut (plus blunt facial crush), but chapter 17 describes a piano-wire garrote kill without explaining those scene-level injuries.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the river-ramp wound language in snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:789 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:790 so the chapter does not over-commit to an incompatible mechanism. Preserve scene horror while shifting from definitive throat-cut causality to forensic-observation language that can align with strangulation and later clarification.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised scene gives each speaker a distinct rhythm/lexicon under pressure and reduces repeated institutional slogan nouns; fail if dialogue remains interchangeable in register and sentence architecture.
findings.problem: Same cross-book pattern as chapter 1: command-room dialogue overfits institutional diction and compresses character voice separation. Clay/Lena/Beau lines often share the same formal argumentative shape.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the command meeting turns at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:883, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:891, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:899, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:901, and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:925. Preserve legal stakes but break cadence symmetry: Clay long framing clauses, Beau colloquial practical pushback, Lena procedural-to-blunt compression.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:961 remains the only still/flat facial-template usage in chapter 3 after revision; fail if additional "went still/went flat" face/eye constructions appear in chapter_03.
findings.problem: Recurring full-book prose tic: default facial stillness/flatness appears across 4 chapters (1, 3, 10, 17). This chapter's instance is the strongest and should be kept as one of the limited retained uses.
findings.rewrite_direction: KEEP the core image at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:961, but ensure no second still/flat facial-template line is introduced in chapter 3 during revision. If neighboring lines are adjusted, preserve this as the chapter's single canonical instance.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
